_note: Scan reports are static fixtures (jq), so every report check is deterministic + air-gap-safe. skopeo checks hit the concrete CRC registry ghcr.io/rummens (samples/hello-dcs:1.0 exists there, public+multiarch); check args are hardcoded to ghcr.io/rummens because the runner single-quotes args (so ${DCS_REGISTRY} would NOT expand there), while run steps use ${DCS_REGISTRY} which the shell does expand. The push step (skopeo copy, page 3) is a narrated workshop:copy block with no examiner check — Harbor is pull-only, so it is never run. deploy-flagged.yaml (page 5) is narrated/observe (no live scanner on CRC) and has no examiner check — never applied. Relies on jq, skopeo, and envsubst existing in the session/examiner image (they do — dcs-workshop-base). Nothing excluded: all 8 content checks run on CRC.
